_note: Emulated from find-test-data eval/index contract (no cast bundle exists for find-test-data). Branch test-data-resolution chain: find-test-data -> user-supplied. Per the 'no fabricated references' property, the issue's accessions are recorded as UNVERIFIED candidates (resolved:false), so the chain falls through to the 'user-supplied' terminal sentinel.

inputs.label: MRSA isolate assemblies
inputs.reason: Source lists candidate isolate accessions only as 'candidate subset to verify', not confirmed direct FASTA download URLs. No stable URL/path can be emitted without fabrication.

candidate_leads.fallback: small Zenodo bundle (combined chromosome+plasmid FASTA per isolate + metadata TSV) if direct INSDC import is unstable

inputs.label: isolate metadata
inputs.reason: No metadata TSV artifact supplied; source lists it as an expected output/fallback input to be hand-curated. Optional workflow input.

inputs.label: StarAMR database
inputs.reason: Parameter value, not staged test data. Pin a specific staramr DB version at test time (source flags DB-version dependence); not resolvable as a data ref.

inputs.label: Species for point mutation analysis
inputs.reason: Parameter value, not staged test data. For MRSA = Staphylococcus aureus; supply at test time.
